description: You have been asked to update the CRM pipeline configuration to match the new sales process. Update the probabilities and requirements for the four default stages: 'New' (5% probability, requirements: 'Initial contact established. Lead source identified.'), 'Qualified' (30% probability, requirements: 'Budget confirmed. Decision maker identified. Need established. Timeline defined.'), 'Proposition' (65% probability, requirements: 'Proposal delivered. Pricing reviewed by customer. Legal or procurement involved.'), and 'Won' (100% probability, requirements: 'Contract signed. Purchase order received.').
